name: LessonLoom
description: Build standards-aligned lesson plans from a prompt, auto-generate worksheets, and share with your grade team.

name: QuizForge
description: Create auto-graded quizzes, exit tickets, and formative checks with question banks aligned to your curriculum.

name: FlashFlow
description: Spaced-repetition flashcards with audio, image occlusion, and shared decks for entire classes.

name: ClassroomCompass
description: Seat maps, behaviour trackers, random picker, timers and group makers — everything a teacher reaches for mid-lesson.

name: GradeGrove
description: A private gradebook with rubric-based marking, standards tracking, and parent-ready report export.

name: Timetabler
description: Constraint-solver that generates conflict-free school timetables for classes, rooms, and shared resources.

name: Attendly
description: Take attendance in ten seconds per class, with automatic absence notifications to parents.

name: ParentLine
description: Two-way messaging between teachers and parents with translation into 40+ languages.

name: MindMapr
description: Collaborative concept maps for note-taking, revision, and group projects — exportable to PDF and Anki.

name: ReadAbility
description: Turn any text into dyslexia-friendly formatting, add text-to-speech, and generate phoneme breakdowns.

name: PronouncePal
description: AI pronunciation coach with waveform feedback — helpful for language learners and speech therapy.

name: LabSafe
description: Interactive safety briefings for science labs and workshops with quiz sign-off for students.

name: CiteRight
description: Reference manager for students and researchers — APA, MLA, Chicago, and Harvard exports in one click.

name: InsightsLED
description: Learning analytics dashboard that surfaces at-risk students using xAPI events from your LMS.

name: RubricRaft
description: Build, share, and reuse analytic rubrics that work in Canvas, Moodle, and Google Classroom.

name: HomeworkHero
description: Homework tracker for learners with parent view, gentle reminders, and study-session timers.

name: PolicyForge
description: Assemble safeguarding, AI-use, and data-protection policies from vetted institutional templates.

name: OpenLecture
description: Record, caption, and publish lectures with searchable transcripts and chapter markers.

name: StudyBuddy
description: AI study partner that quizzes you on your own notes using the Socratic method — no answers handed over.

name: SignalPath
description: Researcher-friendly experiment runner for A/B testing pedagogical interventions in classrooms.
